creator: lucas.james@ldjcs.com.au
text:
On 23/08/2012 03:52, dinoex@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: print/cups-base with ghostscipt cannot print pdf files on hp 1300
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: dinoex
> State-Changed-When: Wed Aug 22 19:50:15 CEST 2012
> State-Changed-Why: 
>
> To change from ghostscript to xpdf pdftops:
> Please run:
>
> make clean
> make config
> make install

This does the trick.

> The patch extends cups to allow this switch in runtime.
> I see no benefit to include it without updating the documentations.
>

Given that the above is working, I don't see a need for switching during
run time.

The only benefit you would get is when trying to debug any issues with
the conversion.

regards,
Lucas

-- 

I was going to include a witty saying
But I couldn't think of one
